basic_details.job_title: Deendayal Research Institute Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline for Stenographer, Program Assistant and More Posts
basic_details.short_information: Deendayal Research Institute Various Posts Notification 2026 has been released on the official website www.gonda.kvk4.in. Candidates can apply for posts including Assistant, Program Assistant (Computer), Stenographer Grade III, and Auxiliary Staff - Driver through the Deendayal Research Institute Recruitment 2026.

age_limit.details: Maximum age limit is 35 years for all posts. Age relaxation for SC/ST and OBC candidates will be as per government rules.

qualification.education_qualification: Bachelor's Degree, Bachelor's degree in Computer science/ Computer Application/B.Tech (Computer Science), 12th passed, Matriculation or equivalent.
qualification.details: Assistant: Bachelor's Degree from a recognized University. Minimum 2 years working experience in Tally Accounting from recognized institution (Desirable). Program Assistant (Computer): Bachelor's degree in Computer science/ Computer Application/B.Tech (Computer Science). 3 years working experience from recognized institution (Desirable). Having knowledge of networking and software (Desirable). Stenographer grade III: 12th passed from recognized board. 3 years working experience in computer typing of Hindi & English (80 w.p.m). Candidate will pass the test of typing in computer as per norm (Desirable). Auxiliary Staff - Driver: Matriculation or equivalent passed from a recognized Board/authorized institution. Possession of a valid and appropriate driving license from prescribed Government Authority. 3 years working experience of driving with valid driving license of heavy vehicles in a recognized institution (Desirable). Driving skill of tractor and its application (Desirable).

salary_details.pay_scale: Rs.9300-34800 + GP of Rs. 4200/-(Pre revised) to Rs.5200-20200 + GP of Rs. 2000/-(Pre revised)
salary_details.details: Assistant: Rs.9300-34800 + GP of Rs. 4200/-(Pre revised) Program Assistant (Computer): Rs.9300-34800 + GP of Rs. 4200/-(Pre revised) Stenographer grade III: Rs.5200-20200 + GP of Rs. 2400/-(Pre revised) Auxiliary Staff - Driver: Rs.5200-20200 + GP of Rs. 2000/-(Pre revised)

how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for Deendayal Research Institute Various Posts Recruitment 2026 through offline mode should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Download the application form from the official website: www.gonda.kvk4.in.
Fill the application form carefully with correct information.
Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates.
Check all details carefully before submission.
Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed.
Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 07-06-2026.
Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the Deendayal Research Institute Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the application for the Deendayal Research Institute Recruitment 2026 is 07-06-2026. Ensure your application reaches the designated address by this date.

faq.question: Q2. How can I apply for the Deendayal Research Institute Various Posts?
faq.answer: Applications are to be submitted offline. You need to download the application form, fill it correctly, attach necessary documents, and send it via Speed Post/RPAD to the address mentioned in the notification.

faq.question: Q3. What is the minimum qualification required for the Deendayal Research Institute posts?
faq.answer: The minimum qualification varies by post, ranging from Matriculation (10th pass) to a Bachelor's Degree in relevant fields like Computer Science or general Bachelor's degrees.

faq.question: Q4. What is the age limit for applying to these posts?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for all posts is 35 years. Age relaxation will be provided to reserved categories as per government rules.

faq.question: Q5. What is the salary structure for the Deendayal Research Institute posts?
faq.answer: The salary ranges from Rs. 5200-20200 + GP of Rs. 2000/- to Rs. 9300-34800 + GP of Rs. 4200/-, depending on the post.

faq.question: Q6. Are there any application fees for the Deendayal Research Institute Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: Yes, there are application fees. UR candidates need to pay Rs. 1000/-, while SC/ST/OBC/EWS candidates need to pay Rs. 500/-.

faq.question: Q7. What is the selection process for these positions?
faq.answer: The selection process will involve a screening of candidates followed by an interview.

faq.question: Q8. Where can I find the official notification and application form?
faq.answer: The official notification and application form can be downloaded from the official website of Deendayal Research Institute, www.gonda.kvk4.in.

faq.question: Q9. What documents are required to be submitted with the application form?
faq.answer: You need to submit self-attested copies of certificates, proof of date of birth, proof of experience, and a self-attested photograph affixed on the application.

faq.question: Q10. Is there any work experience required for these posts?
faq.answer: Work experience is desirable for most posts, ranging from 2 to 3 years in relevant fields like Tally Accounting, computer operations, or driving, depending on the specific post.
